pi_items.source: Task specification - valid path where agent should create the Python script
Task specification - valid path where agent should save the PNG image
PyPI - https://pypi.org/project/matplotlib/ - Matplotlib is a real, widely-used Python plotting library

GitHub - https://github.com/openutm-labs/aerobridge - FlightPlan model exists in gcs_operations.models with fields: id (UUID), name (CharField), plan_file_json (JSONField), geo_json (JSONField), is_editable (BooleanField), created_at (DateTimeField), updated_at (DateTimeField)
Code execution - Generated test matplotlib bar chart PNG: 15,250 bytes, well above 5000 byte minimum. Requirement is reasonable for standard matplotlib PNG output.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires agents to create a bar chart visualization of FlightPlan creation dates using the matplotlib library. The FlightPlan model (with created_at timestamp field) exists in Aerobridge's gcs_operations.models. The setup_task.sh script injects synthetic historical flight plan data distributed across 7 days if fewer than 10 plans exist. The output PNG file must be at least 5000 bytes; typical matplotlib bar charts exceed this threshold at 15KB+. All technical requirements in the metadata are verified against real libraries and existing Aerobridge code.
